headline: China's share of U.S. imports fell to its lowest since 2003
headlineZh: 中國在美國進口的市佔率跌至2003年以來最低點
body: China's share of U.S. goods imports has fallen from approximately 21.6% at its 2016 peak to an estimated 13.3% by early 2026—the lowest in over two decades. The McKinsey Global Institute's 2026 analysis attributes roughly 4.4 percentage points of this decline to 2025 tariff escalations alone. The gap is being filled by a diverse coalition of suppliers, no single one yet large enough to replace China's former scale.
bodyZh: 中國在美國商品進口的市佔率，已從2016年高峰的約21.6%跌至2026年初估計的13.3%，創下逾二十年新低。麥肯錫全球研究院2026年分析指出，光是2025年的關稅升級便造成逾4個百分點的跌幅。這塊空缺正被越南、墨西哥、印度等新興出口國分食，但各方體量仍難以填補中國昔日的地位。台灣供應鏈業者需理解：中國份額的萎縮並非單一接班者承接，而是碎片化分散至十餘個國家，意味著全球採購布局將長期呈現多極化格局。

headline: India captured 40% of the smartphone imports China lost
headlineZh: 印度承接了中國讓出智慧型手機進口份額的四成
body: As U.S. tariffs on Chinese smartphones reached 145% in 2025, Apple accelerated its India sourcing program. By Q4 2025, iPhones assembled in India accounted for a significant portion of U.S. shipments. McKinsey estimates India captured roughly 40% of the smartphone import value China ceded, representing approximately $18 billion in redirected trade annually.
bodyZh: 2025年美國對中國智慧型手機課徵145%關稅後，蘋果加速在印度的生產布局。麥肯錫估計，印度承接了中國讓出約40%的智慧型手機進口金額，相當於每年約180億美元的貿易轉移。對台灣供應鏈業者而言，這既是轉機也是壓力——鴻海、和碩在印度的生產擴張帶動台系零件需求，但印度本土供應商的比例也在逐步提升，長期可能壓縮台廠在印度供應鏈中的附加價值空間。

headline: Taiwan's semiconductor exports to the U.S. grew even as total chip trade plateaued
headlineZh: 全球晶片貿易趨平，台灣對美半導體出口仍逆勢成長
body: Despite global semiconductor trade plateauing at around $600 billion annually, Taiwan's exports of advanced logic chips to the United States grew by an estimated 12% year-on-year in 2025. TSMC's monopoly on sub-3nm production—and the exclusion of Chinese fabs from advanced node access—made Taiwan an indispensable node in the AI supply chain, even as geopolitical risk premiums on the strait widened.
bodyZh: 全球半導體貿易總額雖趨於平穩，台灣對美先進邏輯晶片出口在2025年仍逆勢成長約12%。台積電對3奈米以下製程的壟斷地位，加上中國晶圓廠被拒於先進製程門外，使台灣成為AI供應鏈中不可或缺的節點。然而，隨著台海地緣風險溢價持續擴大，「台灣優勢」也愈來愈像是一把雙面刃——美方加速補貼台積電赴美設廠，部分技術移轉壓力已然浮現，台灣在半導體版圖中的不可替代性正在被刻意稀釋。

headline: ASEAN's combined share of U.S. imports rose by the largest margin on record
headlineZh: 東協在美國進口的合計市佔率創歷史最大單期升幅
body: ASEAN's combined share of U.S. goods imports rose by 2.5 percentage points between 2018 and 2025—the largest sustained regional gain on record. Vietnam, Thailand, Malaysia and Indonesia all recorded double-digit export growth to the United States. McKinsey's 2026 report notes that ASEAN's export gains of approximately 14% are partly organic growth and partly trade deflection, as Chinese manufacturers established operations within ASEAN borders to access lower tariff rates.
bodyZh: 2018至2025年間，東協在美國商品進口的合計市佔率上升了2.5個百分點，創下有記錄以來最大的持續性區域增幅，越南、泰國、馬來西亞、印尼對美出口均呈雙位數成長。然而麥肯錫2026年報告也指出，部分「東協出口」實為中國廠商在當地設廠後的貿易轉包，反映出供應鏈重組中不乏「換殼不換芯」的現象。這也是美國商務部持續審查的焦點，未來若認定存在規避關稅行為，相關東協出口商可能面臨補徵關稅的風險。

headline: AI-related goods trade grew nearly 40%, dwarfing all other sectors
headlineZh: AI相關商品貿易成長近四成，遠超所有其他產業
body: The WTO's March 2026 World Trade Report identified AI-related goods—servers, high-bandwidth memory, advanced logic chips, and associated cooling infrastructure—as the fastest-growing trade category, expanding nearly 40% year-on-year versus a 6.5% global merchandise trade average. Taiwan, South Korea and Malaysia are the primary beneficiaries, supplying the GPU, HBM and substrate layers that power the AI buildout.
bodyZh: 世界貿易組織2026年3月報告將AI相關商品——伺服器、高頻寬記憶體、先進邏輯晶片及散熱基礎設施——列為成長最快的貿易類別，年增近40%，遠超全球商品貿易平均6.5%。台灣、韓國與馬來西亞是最主要的受益方，分別供應GPU、HBM與載板等AI基礎設施核心零件。對台灣而言，這股趨勢意味著即便在傳統貿易戰的陰影下，AI資本支出所帶動的晶片需求仍足以支撐出口動能——但這份韌性高度集中於台積電與少數封測廠，整體供應鏈的脆弱性並未因此減少。

headline: The U.S. trade deficit barely changed despite the largest tariff increase in a century
headlineZh: 近百年最大規模關稅升級，美國貿易逆差幾乎紋風不動
body: Despite the largest peacetime tariff increase in U.S. history, the U.S. goods trade deficit barely moved—from $903.5 billion in 2024 to approximately $901.5 billion in 2025, according to BEA preliminary data. The deficit with China fell sharply, but was largely offset by widening deficits with Vietnam, Mexico, Ireland (pharma), and South Korea. The data challenges the policy premise that tariffs reduce overall deficits, as opposed to rerouting them.
bodyZh: 依據美國經濟分析局初步數據，儘管美國祭出近代史上最大規模的關稅升級，商品貿易逆差幾乎紋風不動——從2024年的9,035億美元，僅微縮至2025年約9,015億美元。對中逆差雖大幅收窄，卻被越南、墨西哥、愛爾蘭（製藥轉口）及韓國的逆差擴大所抵消。這一數據從根本上挑戰了「關稅能縮小整體逆差」的政策前提：關稅重塑的是供應鏈地理，而非貿易總量。對台灣的啟示是：即便美中緊張長期持續，美國對外採購的總規模不會因此大幅萎縮，真正改變的是訂單流向。

headline: China's share of U.S. imports fell by 19.9pp (2018–2024)
headlineZh: 中國在美國進口市佔率自2018年下降19.9個百分點
body: China's share of tracked U.S. goods imports moved from 45.5% in 2018 to 25.6% in 2024 (-19.9pp). Source: UN Comtrade.
bodyZh: 中國在美國受追蹤商品進口中的佔比自2018年45.5%下降至2024年25.6%（-19.9pp）。資料來源：聯合國商品貿易統計資料庫。

headline: Japan's share of U.S. imports fell by 2.4pp (2018–2024)
headlineZh: 日本在美國進口市佔率自2018年下降2.4個百分點
body: Japan's share of tracked U.S. goods imports moved from 10.4% in 2018 to 8.0% in 2024 (-2.4pp). Source: UN Comtrade.
bodyZh: 日本在美國受追蹤商品進口中的佔比自2018年10.4%下降至2024年8.0%（-2.4pp）。資料來源：聯合國商品貿易統計資料庫。

headline: Mexico's EV & battery exports to the U.S. have risen for 3 consecutive years
headlineZh: 墨西哥對美電動車與電池出口已連續成長3年
body: U.S. imports of EV & battery goods from Mexico moved in the same direction for 3 consecutive years (2021–2024). Source: UN Comtrade.
bodyZh: 美國自墨西哥進口電動車與電池商品已連續3年朝同方向變動（2021–2024）。資料來源：聯合國商品貿易統計資料庫。

headline: Taiwan's semiconductor exports to the U.S. have risen for 3 consecutive years
headlineZh: 台灣對美半導體出口已連續成長3年
body: U.S. imports of semiconductor goods from Taiwan moved in the same direction for 3 consecutive years (2021–2024). Source: UN Comtrade.
bodyZh: 美國自台灣進口半導體商品已連續3年朝同方向變動（2021–2024）。資料來源：聯合國商品貿易統計資料庫。

headline: India's smartphone exports to the U.S. have risen for 3 consecutive years
headlineZh: 印度對美智慧型手機出口已連續成長3年
body: U.S. imports of smartphone goods from India moved in the same direction for 3 consecutive years (2021–2024). Source: UN Comtrade.
bodyZh: 美國自印度進口智慧型手機商品已連續3年朝同方向變動（2021–2024）。資料來源：聯合國商品貿易統計資料庫。

headline: Vietnam's semiconductor exports to the U.S. have risen for 3 consecutive years
headlineZh: 越南對美半導體出口已連續成長3年
body: U.S. imports of semiconductor goods from Vietnam moved in the same direction for 3 consecutive years (2021–2024). Source: UN Comtrade.
bodyZh: 美國自越南進口半導體商品已連續3年朝同方向變動（2021–2024）。資料來源：聯合國商品貿易統計資料庫。

headline: Thailand's semiconductor exports to the U.S. have risen for 3 consecutive years
headlineZh: 泰國對美半導體出口已連續成長3年
body: U.S. imports of semiconductor goods from Thailand moved in the same direction for 3 consecutive years (2021–2024). Source: UN Comtrade.
bodyZh: 美國自泰國進口半導體商品已連續3年朝同方向變動（2021–2024）。資料來源：聯合國商品貿易統計資料庫。

headline: Thailand's smartphone exports to the U.S. have risen for 3 consecutive years
headlineZh: 泰國對美智慧型手機出口已連續成長3年
body: U.S. imports of smartphone goods from Thailand moved in the same direction for 3 consecutive years (2021–2024). Source: UN Comtrade.
bodyZh: 美國自泰國進口智慧型手機商品已連續3年朝同方向變動（2021–2024）。資料來源：聯合國商品貿易統計資料庫。

headline: Thailand's EV & battery exports to the U.S. have risen for 3 consecutive years
headlineZh: 泰國對美電動車與電池出口已連續成長3年
body: U.S. imports of EV & battery goods from Thailand moved in the same direction for 3 consecutive years (2021–2024). Source: UN Comtrade.
bodyZh: 美國自泰國進口電動車與電池商品已連續3年朝同方向變動（2021–2024）。資料來源：聯合國商品貿易統計資料庫。

headline: Indonesia's semiconductor exports to the U.S. reversed direction in 2024
headlineZh: 印尼對美半導體出口在2024年出現趨勢逆轉
body: After falling in 2023, U.S. imports of semiconductor goods from Indonesia increased 46.3% in 2024. Source: UN Comtrade.
bodyZh: 在2023年下降後，美國自印尼進口半導體商品在2024年轉升46.3%。資料來源：聯合國商品貿易統計資料庫。

headline: Indonesia's smartphone exports to the U.S. reversed direction in 2024
headlineZh: 印尼對美智慧型手機出口在2024年出現趨勢逆轉
body: After rising in 2023, U.S. imports of smartphone goods from Indonesia decreased 17.9% in 2024. Source: UN Comtrade.
bodyZh: 在2023年上升後，美國自印尼進口智慧型手機商品在2024年轉降17.9%。資料來源：聯合國商品貿易統計資料庫。

headline: South Korea's semiconductor exports to the U.S. reversed direction in 2024
headlineZh: 韓國對美半導體出口在2024年出現趨勢逆轉
body: After falling in 2023, U.S. imports of semiconductor goods from South Korea increased 31.9% in 2024. Source: UN Comtrade.
bodyZh: 在2023年下降後，美國自韓國進口半導體商品在2024年轉升31.9%。資料來源：聯合國商品貿易統計資料庫。

headline: South Korea's smartphone exports to the U.S. reversed direction in 2024
headlineZh: 韓國對美智慧型手機出口在2024年出現趨勢逆轉
body: After rising in 2023, U.S. imports of smartphone goods from South Korea decreased 72.4% in 2024. Source: UN Comtrade.
bodyZh: 在2023年上升後，美國自韓國進口智慧型手機商品在2024年轉降72.4%。資料來源：聯合國商品貿易統計資料庫。

headline: Malaysia's smartphone exports to the U.S. reversed direction in 2024
headlineZh: 馬來西亞對美智慧型手機出口在2024年出現趨勢逆轉
body: After falling in 2023, U.S. imports of smartphone goods from Malaysia increased 26.2% in 2024. Source: UN Comtrade.
bodyZh: 在2023年下降後，美國自馬來西亞進口智慧型手機商品在2024年轉升26.2%。資料來源：聯合國商品貿易統計資料庫。

headline: Mexico's semiconductor exports to the U.S. reversed direction in 2024
headlineZh: 墨西哥對美半導體出口在2024年出現趨勢逆轉
body: After falling in 2023, U.S. imports of semiconductor goods from Mexico increased 65.4% in 2024. Source: UN Comtrade.
bodyZh: 在2023年下降後，美國自墨西哥進口半導體商品在2024年轉升65.4%。資料來源：聯合國商品貿易統計資料庫。

headline: Taiwan's EV & battery exports to the U.S. reversed direction in 2024
headlineZh: 台灣對美電動車與電池出口在2024年出現趨勢逆轉
body: After falling in 2023, U.S. imports of EV & battery goods from Taiwan increased 19.6% in 2024. Source: UN Comtrade.
bodyZh: 在2023年下降後，美國自台灣進口電動車與電池商品在2024年轉升19.6%。資料來源：聯合國商品貿易統計資料庫。
